Repeat.Words: anger bad bite biter blade blood bone breaker bug bug cackle cave claw club crazed crooked cruel dark dirt dirt doom dread dread dumb eater evil eye face fear fear filth filth fist foot foul glare gloom gloom glum green grey grim grim grime grime grin grip grit grit hand hide horror hunter killer knife knuckle lash lasher little mad mad mean mud mud murder murmur mutter nose pain poison rat rot rotten scream shadow sick skull slicer smack smash snake snapper snare snarl snarl snatch snatcher sneak sneak spider stab stab stare steel stink stinker swipe switch tangle teeth terror thief toe tooth trap twist twist twisted weasle worg worm yellow
